expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md matches the source fixture AGENTS.md.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

- Use `python3` for repo scripts.
- Run `pytest tests/unit -q` for unit-test-only changes.

expectations.text: No new scoped AGENTS.md files are created.
outputs/report.md says none qualified or no changes were made.
expectations.evidence:
Result: copied fixture repo to `outputs/repo/` unchanged.

Durable-guidance review:
- Reviewed `AGENTS.md` and `session_notes.md`.
- `AGENTS.md` already captures the only durable repo-specific guidance (`python3` for scripts and `pytest tests/unit -q` for unit-test-only changes).
- Session-note items were one-off noise (`README.md` opened, temporary branch name, one slow test run once) and did not qualify as durable guidance.

Outcome: none qualified. No changes were made to any `AGENTS.md` content.
